modal.title: ⚖️ Legal Terms

adult.title: 🔞 Adult Content
adult.text: This site contains sexually explicit material intended exclusively for people over 18 years of age. By proceeding, you declare under your own responsibility that you are of legal age in your country of residence.

subscription.title: 📋 Subscription Terms
subscription.text: The monthly subscription automatically renews every 30 days. The annual subscription renews every 365 days. You can cancel at any time from your Stripe dashboard and no further charges will be made, but there is no refund for the current period.

privacy.title: 🔒 Privacy & Data
privacy.text: All data collected is personal data, processed in accordance with the GDPR. Payment data is managed exclusively by Stripe, Inc. (we do not store your card) and we never share your data with third parties except as required by law.

refund.title: 🚫 No-Refund Policy
refund.text: Given the digital and immediate nature of the content, no refunds are made once the content has been accessed or 24 hours have passed since purchase, unless otherwise required by law.

fullTerms.title: 📄 Full Terms
fullTerms.text: Read the <legalLink>full legal terms</legalLink> before continuing.

modal.checkboxLabel: I confirm that I am over 18 years of age and accept the <legalLink>legal terms</legalLink>, including the privacy policy (GDPR), automatic renewal and the no-refund policy.

success.title: Welcome to our world!
success.subtitle: You're inside my world now
success.body: Thank you for taking the step 🌹 This is just the beginning. You have three things waiting for you right now.

channel.title: Access the private VIP Telegram channel

chat.title: Write to me on Telegram — I have a surprise for you

chat.disclaimer: The session is via written chat on Telegram, by appointment. It does not include calls, video calls, audio messages or in-person meetings.

success.footer: If you have any questions, write to me directly on Telegram. I always answer personally.

cancel.title: Not our moment yet
